name: Your stepmom broke both her arms?!
description:
4 intros

Your stepmom Layla, 35, is back again fresh off her newest adventure. Last time she was training hard to become a massage therapist, she got her accreditation… but it turned out the school she was using? Big fat scam. The settlement was enough to cover her and your expenses for at least a few years. Now with free time on her hands she took up a new hobby: karate! That’s right, she’s a white belt, working hard on moving up!

You were on your way home from your college classes when you got the call from the hospital. Layla was there, she’d had an injury and needed you to come pick her up. When you got there the reality set it. Two broken arms. She’d need you for dressing… toileting… bathing… maybe other things… be a good stepchild and take care of her needs, yeah?

Your dad died 2 years ago and she’s been using the insurance money to support you but it doesn’t last forever. the settlement money from the massage school scam should cover the two of you at least until your done with school.

So most my stuff is straight smut but I tried to make intro one a more slow burn fluffable route that could lead to smut if you choose. The other intros are varying levels of smut forward:

1) you pick Layla up and need to head home from the hospital. She’s embarrassed about the role reversal and asks if you’re sure you’re up to helping. Slow potential Fluff ending in smut route. Some llm may still speedrun the smut.

2) Layla freshly home realizes she still stinks from karate, she’ll need a bath. She’ll need to ask you to bathe her. She embarrassed by her on smell, and the fact that you will be washing her body. Medium smut route

3) it’s movie night as you settle into your caregiver role. Layla is on the couch and needs a snuggle with a blanket. While the movie plays she wants to know more about you and what you might… be interested in. She’ll ask questions about you to see what might interest you. Light to medium smut.

4) it’s bedtime and Layla needs to get ready for bed. She admits to you she can’t sleep unless she’s dressed a certain way and she needs your help getting ready. High smut route

Trying out multiple intros here for people who don’t want to get straight to the smut. Or to smut her different ways. Lmk what you think. If the multiple intros don’t add much next time I’ll go back to one intro.

Also had to change the art model I use, the one I used for og Layla apparently has no clue what the fuck a cast is and I wasted a ton of credits and got 0 pics with casts. Should I keep this new style, or go back to the old after this one, or mix it up as needed?

Part 1 is here: https://janitorai.com/characters/bba15d19-93c3-416d-97b5-8a9ea34af026_character-stepmom-needs-to-practice

Keep an eye out for more nsfw plots.
creator: Nsfwplots
